description: An account manager needs to generate a quarterly business review (QBR) report for a key client, showing metrics like on-time shipping and order accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Select the customer and the date range for the report (the previous quarter).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly specifies the report parameters.

nodes.task_description: Generate the performance report from the system.

expected_outcome.expected: A report is generated with KPIs like 'On-Time Shipping: 98.5%' and 'Order Accuracy: 99.7%'.

nodes.task_description: Export the report to a PDF and email it to the account manager.

expected_outcome.expected: The report is successfully generated and sent.
